title: In This Family We Hold Money Well
subtitle: An affirmation for the new family money story
excerpt: A short affirmation for Day 14. It names the new family story in present tense — not as a future aspiration but as an identity already being lived.
sourceNotes: Day 14 theme from MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: On Day 14 or any morning when you want to name the new family story out loud as a present fact.

content.text: An affirmation for Day 14. It speaks the new story in present tense — not "one day we will" but "in this family, now, this is who we are."
The affirmation names the family as a unit — you plus whoever comes after. It places holding money well as the current identity, not a goal.
I allow myself to celebrate the beginning of a family story rooted in freedom, abundance, and love. In this family, we hold money well.
Say it three times in the morning. The second sentence is the declaration — let it land before you move on.
(Rebecca J Page, 2025). The affirmation line is adapted from the Day 14 journal affirmation in
